_meta.description: Sample DevOps query workloads mapped to Ch1's BenchmarkQED scope x type quadrants, for the vector-vs-graph retrieval selector. Fictional AWS account 123456789012.

workloads.name: specific-5xx-lookup
workloads.note: DataLocal: 'show me the 5xx errors in the checkout log in the last hour'.

workloads.name: cascading-migration-impact
workloads.note: Associativity gap: 'which services were affected by the database migration that followed the security patch we discussed last month'.

workloads.name: systemic-outage-pattern
workloads.note: ActivityGlobal: 'what systematic issues across our infrastructure keep causing repeated outages'.

workloads.name: autonomous-devops-agent
workloads.note: Agentic workload: moves constantly between specific configs (local) and system-wide implications (global).

workloads.name: bigger-window-proposal
workloads.note: The rebuttal case: 'let us just use a 1M-token context window instead of a graph'.
